# Hook fixtures

`agile-workflow-hooks.json` is a hermetic snapshot of
`/home/nathan/dev/skills/plugins/agile-workflow/hooks/hooks.json` from the
agile-workflow fixture source at commit `8d312608113b2e64932f2a9cdb39a2995b2cb11c`.
It is copied verbatim so reader tests do not depend on the adjacent checkout.
